sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt64, event_time DateTime, duration String, value Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, event_time + toIntervalMillisecond(CAST(duration AS Int32)) AS new_time FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL OR duration = '';
SELECT id, event_time, duration, value, toIntervalMillisecond(CASE WHEN value IS NOT NULL THEN 100 ELSE 200 END) AS interval FROM test_table WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_table);
SELECT id, event_time, duration, toIntervalMillisecond(50) AS interval FROM test_table WHERE value > 0 OR event_time < (SELECT MAX(event_time) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL);
SELECT id, event_time + toIntervalMillisecond(CAST(NULLIF(duration, '') AS Int32)) AS adjusted_time FROM test_table HAVING adjusted_time < NOW() OR adjusted_time IS NULL;

WITH (SELECT AVG(value) AS avg_value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS avg FROM test_table WHERE (value < avg) OR (duration LIKE '4%') OR (id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE duration NOT LIKE '%0%'));
SELECT DISTINCT id, value FROM test_table WHERE (duration = '300' AND value = 0.567) OR (event_time + toIntervalMillisecond(150) >= NOW());
SELECT id, event_time + toIntervalMillisecond((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL)) AS total_adjusted_time FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING total_adjusted_time <= NOW();
